headline: How U.S. Bank’s Avvance Expansion At U.S. Bancorp (USB) Has Changed Its Investment Story
summary: Earlier this month, U.S. Bank expanded its Avvance point-of-sale lending platform with new six- and seven-year loan options for larger home improvement projects and broadened distribution by joining the Skeps multi-lender orchestration network. By pairing longer-term, embedded financing with Skeps’ multi-lender matching capabilities, U.S. Bank is pushing Avvance deeper into merchants’ checkout flows and everyday customer decision-making. Now we’ll examine how Avvance’s extended loan terms...

headline: VFVA’s Deep Value Strategy Carries a Hidden Volatility Risk Most Investors Overlook
summary: Vanguard U.S. Value Factor ETF (BATS:VFVA) is built around an aggressive premise: find the cheapest U.S. stocks by screening across price-to-earnings, price-to-cash-flow, and balance sheet strength simultaneously. The fund holds 500+ individual positions and charges just 0.13% annually, making it one of the most cost-efficient ways to access deep value factor exposure. Investors buy it ... VFVA’s Deep Value Strategy Carries a Hidden Volatility Risk Most Investors Overlook
